CE1.justification: Acted directly; no clarifying questions, no documents tossed back to the user.

CE2.justification: Final response itself is tight, but the run record carries heavy process narration (granular step-by-step actions log plus a long notes section flagging runbook drafting inconsistency); one extended stretch of unneeded prose.

CE3.justification: Final response names each destination with a brief why ('two immediate action items promoted', 'second such rollback this quarter — if it recurs, that becomes a decisions.md commitment').

CE4.justification: Strict per-step artifact production; no in-progress orphans — interruption at any step leaves a coherent intermediate chain.
